channel.title: recent
channel.description: I write about how I use python and linux in data science.

item.title: 💭 Wes Bos On X: "Are You Using Position: Absolute; To Overlap Elements? It'S Almost Always Better To Use Css Grid Instead! Https://T.Co/Hmpbexr88Q" / X
item.description: This is a pretty incredible use of css grid to overlay items overtop of each other without needing to resort to `positio
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Alternatives To Using Pure Black (#000000) For Text And Backgrounds | By Dmitry Sergushkin | Aug, 2024 | Ux Planet
item.description: A nice set of blacks to use in web design. Subtle variants off of black or white like this can really make your design l
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Buttery Icons
item.description: Some sick looking icons no attribution needed.
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Not - Ltt Screwdriver - Fancy By Erer2001 | Download Free Stl Model | Printables.Com
item.description: someone has created a knock off of the ltt screwdriver and made it printable
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Installing Python - Uv
item.description: `uv` now can install python for you. `uv` is inspired by rust's cargo, an all in one fast package and installation mana
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Switching Configs In Neovim • Michael Uloth
item.description: Switching between nvim configs can be really easy to do since they implemented the `NVIM_APPNAME` Environment Variable.
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Hotkey To Open Link Under At The Text Cursor Position While Typing In Edit Mode - Help - Obsidian Forum
item.description: Obsidian has a go to definition like feature, the keybind is alt+enter, I would have never guessed this one.
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: 💭 Keyboard Build Log | Halfwit’S Dev Blog
item.description: This is the coolest scrappy build, no printer or modeling required, no fancy tools, just straight chisel and claw hammer
item.author: Waylon Walker

item.title: Vim-Gq
item.description: Vim has a handy feature to format text with ![ ![
